int32_t llvm::SignExtend32 (uint32_t x)

 Sign extend number in the bottom B bits of X to a 32-bit int. Requires 0 < B <= 32.

int64_t llvm::SignExtend64 (uint64_t x)
int64_t llvm::SignExtend64 (uint64_t X, unsigned B)

Macro Definition Documentation

◆ R2

#define R2 ( n)
Value:
n, n + 2 * 64, n + 1 * 64, n + 3 * 64

Referenced by foldLogOpOfMaskedICmpsHelper(), llvm::SCEVAddRecExpr::getNumIterationsInRange(), llvm::isARMArea1Register(), llvm::isARMLowRegister(), and llvm::BitstreamCursor::Read().

◆ R4

#define R4 ( n)
Value:
R2(n), R2(n + 2 * 16), R2(n + 1 * 16), R2(n + 3 * 16)
R2
#define R2(n)

Referenced by llvm::isARMArea1Register(), and llvm::isARMLowRegister().

◆ R6

#define R6 ( n)
Value:
R4(n), R4(n + 2 * 4), R4(n + 1 * 4), R4(n + 3 * 4)
R4
#define R4(n)

Referenced by llvm::ARMBaseRegisterInfo::ARMBaseRegisterInfo(), llvm::isARMArea1Register(), and llvm::isARMLowRegister().
